name: Karate Boy
description: Be the champ and knock down as many tree as possible with your mega punch! Play this adrenaline rush game with lots of intensity. Be specific with your timing as you need to punch the tree in the exact time to smash it so you can create a way to run as far as you can.
instructions: Just one Click Tap to play
tags: Arcade, Boy, Boys, Casual, HTML, HTML5, Mobile
